task: Execute first Phase C search-lane experiment on fixed benchmark tiny_leela_phase_b_fixed_metrics_v1.
outcome: Kept prior_proportional root distribution experiment. fixed_playout_suite_score=73.468924, policy_cross_entropy=1.101706, top1/top3=1.0. Argmax comparison in manual check was fixed_playout_suite_score=33.849477 and CE=13.078683.
next_action_hint: Continue L002 with sqrt_prior ablation or value-weighted one-ply root policy without changing fixed fixtures.

task: Execute scheduler-assigned runtime/backend lane comparing browser inference fallback strategies under fixed profiles.
outcome: Kept progressive_fallback strategy. browser_compatibility_score=83.525, compatible_profiles=3/4, median_move_latency_ms=147.5. Manual webgpu_only baseline was score=44.575, compatible_profiles=2/4, median=542.5.
next_action_hint: For L003, replace estimated latencies with measured evaluator/model latency only after model artifact exists; otherwise scheduler should rotate to search/model/training lanes.

task: Ablate sqrt_prior root distribution in scheduler-assigned search lane.
outcome: Discarded: fixed_playout_suite_score=71.610243 and policy_cross_entropy=1.167327, worse than prior_proportional score=73.468924 and CE=1.101706. No code changes needed.
next_action_hint: Try value-aware one-ply root policy or uncertainty-based allocation; avoid more simple monotonic transforms unless fixtures change.

task: Rerun current best prior_proportional search variant for deterministic confirmation.
outcome: Kept/confirmed current best: fixed_playout_suite_score=73.468924, policy_cross_entropy=1.101706, top1/top3=1.0. No code changes.
next_action_hint: Avoid more simple prior transforms. Rotate to architecture/training/evaluation, or create a new benchmark version with per-move value fixtures before value-aware search.

task: Formally log argmax root policy baseline in search lane.
outcome: Discarded: fixed_playout_suite_score=33.849477, CE=13.078683. Top1/top3 remain 1.0, showing top-k metrics alone are insufficient. No code changes.
next_action_hint: Current search lane should pause/rotate; need per-move value/search targets in a new benchmark version for meaningful value-aware PUCT experiments.

task: Execute scheduler-assigned L002 search lane despite prior saturation.
outcome: Kept deterministic confirmation: fixed_playout_suite_score=73.468924, CE=1.101706. No code changes. L002 is saturated under current policy-only metric.
next_action_hint: Rotate to architecture/training/runtime/evaluation; do not spend more search quanta until benchmark includes per-move value/search targets.

task: Rerun sqrt_prior in L002 due to scheduler still assigning saturated search lane.
outcome: Discarded duplicate: fixed_playout_suite_score=71.610243, CE=1.167327. Confirms L002 is saturated and further policy-only transforms are tunnel vision.

task: Evaluate wasm_fallback runtime strategy in L003.
outcome: Discarded: browser_compatibility_score=73.525, below progressive_fallback 83.525. Compatible profiles and median latency match, but no cache/progressive loading bonus.
next_action_hint: Runtime lane should pause until measured latency/model artifact; rotate to L004 architecture.

task: Formally log WebGPU-only runtime baseline.
outcome: Discarded: browser_compatibility_score=44.575, compatible_profiles=2/4, median_move_latency_ms=542.5. Confirms fallback is required for product runtime.
next_action_hint: Pause runtime lane until measured model latency exists; rotate to architecture/training/evaluation.

task: Confirm progressive_fallback current best in L003.
outcome: Kept/confirmed deterministic best: browser_compatibility_score=83.525, compatible_profiles=3/4, median=147.5. L003 saturated under estimated profiles.
next_action_hint: Rotate to L004 architecture/training. Runtime should wait for model artifact and measured latency.

task: Execute architecture lane by comparing tiny conv student specs under frozen Phase B proxy metrics.
outcome: Kept practical_64x6_int8. architecture_score=78.354004, policy_top1=0.585, policy_top5=0.865, wdl_cross_entropy=0.98675, model_size_mb=0.590332. Manual sweep showed 16x2=58.31, 24x3=65.18, 48x5=75.02, 64x6=78.35.
validation_commands: for s in micro_16x2_int8 small_24x3_int8 balanced_48x5_int8 practical_64x6_int8; do TINY_LEELA_MODEL_SPEC=$s node --experimental-strip-types eval/architecture_suite.mjs; done
next_action_hint: Ablate 48x5 vs 64x6 or start training lane to replace proxy estimates with real teacher-label metrics.

task: Set up real lc0 teacher distillation readiness pipeline.
outcome: Kept pipeline scaffolding but actual distillation is not ready in this environment: lc0_binary_ready=0, lc0_weights_ready=0, distillation_ready=0. Tests pass and sample labels validate.
next_action_hint: Install/provide lc0 and weights, set LC0_BIN and LC0_WEIGHTS, then run distill:query to generate data/teacher_labels.jsonl.

task: Use web search to document/setup lc0 teacher and optional Stockfish second teacher for distillation.
outcome: Kept setup/docs and Stockfish scripts. Local readiness remains zero for both engines because neither binary nor lc0 weights are installed. Web sources identify lc0 engine and weights as separate artifacts and Stockfish as practical UCI fallback.
next_action_hint: If network/package install is allowed, install stockfish via apt and obtain lc0 release/binary plus .pb.gz network from lczero network pages; then run real query scripts.

task: Install lc0 and Stockfish locally for distillation.
outcome: Succeeded without sudo. distillation_ready=1 and stockfish_distillation_ready=1. Built lc0 v0.32.1 from source, downloaded 308MB LCZero weights, extracted Stockfish 16 Ubuntu package locally. Smoke-generated and validated 3 lc0 labels and 3 Stockfish labels.
failures: sudo apt install was not available; worked around with apt-get download/dpkg-deb extraction
lc0 has no --version flag; checker changed to UCI handshake
next_action_hint: Use env vars in future commands. Generate stronger labels with lc0 nodes>=64 and Stockfish depth>=10, then build training/train_student.py.

task: Generate stronger teacher labels and train first real distilled student baseline.
outcome: Kept first trainable baseline. Generated lc0 nodes=64 and Stockfish depth=10 labels for 3 seed positions. Trained pure-Python linear FEN student on 6 rows: distill_student_score=16.90255, dev_policy_ce=3.121585, dev_wdl_ce=1.794682, dev_policy_top1=0.666667, move_vocab=20.
validation_commands: run_research_experiment: python3 training/train_student.py --train data/teacher_labels.jsonl data/stockfish_teacher_labels.jsonl --out artifacts/student_linear.json
failures: Only 3 seed positions, so held-out metrics are tiny-fixture model-quality metrics only
Lc0 UCI parser currently yielded one move per position despite MultiPV request; Stockfish labels are richer
next_action_hint: Expand seed FENs and improve lc0 policy extraction/option handling before claiming model strength; then compare architecture/training variants.

task: Expand teacher dataset and improve lc0 policy extraction.
outcome: Kept dataset/extraction upgrade. Added 10-position distillation seed set; regenerated 20 teacher rows (lc0 nodes=16, Stockfish depth=8). Lc0 avg_policy_moves=3.3 instead of one-hot; Stockfish avg=4.0. Linear student on harder v2 scored 12.046814 with dev_policy_ce=6.566377 and move_vocab=44.
validation_commands: run_research_experiment: python3 training/train_student.py --train data/teacher_labels.jsonl data/stockfish_teacher_labels.jsonl --out artifacts/student_linear.json
failures: Metric not comparable with prior 3-position fixture; v2 is harder and intended to replace the easy dataset for training research
Linear FEN baseline dev_policy_top1=0 on v2 holdout
next_action_hint: Implement a stronger student representation (board-square features or small MLP) and compare against v2 baseline, or increase lc0 nodes after verbose extraction.

task: Soft-prune saturated/complete lanes so scheduler attention shifts to real teacher-distillation research.
outcome: Marked L001/L002 search lanes paused, L003 runtime paused, L004 architecture proxy paused, and L005 teacher setup complete. Left L006 active as current real research focus. Reset scheduler cursor/last_scheduled_lane_id toward L006.
validation_commands: python3 status listing of lane statuses
next_action_hint: Call schedule_next; expect L006 or newly queued student/loss/data ideas instead of saturated search/runtime/proxy lanes.

task: Evaluate board-square linear student representation against aggregate linear baseline on v2 labels.
outcome: Discarded. distill_student_score=11.555163 vs aggregate baseline 12.046814. dev_policy_ce improved slightly (6.440227 vs 6.566377) but dev_wdl_ce worsened (1.213913 vs 0.734573); feature_dim=770 likely overfits 20 rows.
validation_commands: python3 training/train_student.py --features aggregate --train data/teacher_labels.jsonl data/stockfish_teacher_labels.jsonl --out artifacts/student_aggregate.json
run_research_experiment: python3 training/train_student.py --features board_square --train data/teacher_labels.jsonl data/stockfish_teacher_labels.jsonl --out artifacts/student_board_square.json
next_action_hint: Revert feature-code candidate or use it only if folded into a stronger small MLP/shared representation; next lane should try MLP or teacher/loss ablations.

task: Evaluate dependency-free small MLP student on fixed v2 labels.
outcome: Discarded. distill_student_score=9.60206 vs linear baseline 12.046814. Train losses improved but dev_policy_ce=7.595354 and dev_wdl_ce=1.819077 worsened, indicating overfit/instability on 20-row dataset.
validation_commands: python3 training/train_student.py --model linear --train data/teacher_labels.jsonl data/stockfish_teacher_labels.jsonl --out artifacts/student_linear.json
run_research_experiment: python3 training/train_student.py --model mlp --hidden 16 --train data/teacher_labels.jsonl data/stockfish_teacher_labels.jsonl --out artifacts/student_mlp.json
next_action_hint: Revert MLP candidate. Next try teacher-source ablations or policy/WDL loss mixes, which do not add capacity.

task: Run teacher-source ablations on fixed v2 labels.
outcome: Kept combined teacher data as default. Scores: lc0-only=10.643424, Stockfish-only=11.723282, combined=12.046814. Stockfish-only improved dev_top1=0.2 and dev_wdl_ce=0.612093, but combined had best primary and lower dev_policy_ce.
validation_commands: run_research_experiment: python3 training/train_student.py --train data/teacher_labels.jsonl data/stockfish_teacher_labels.jsonl --out artifacts/student_combined.json
next_action_hint: Run policy/WDL loss-mix ablations. Combined source stays default unless optimizing top1/WDL specifically.

task: Use internal dovetail runner to test training-only WDL draw regularization on the fixed consensus-label distillation benchmark.

next_action_hint: Revert draw_regularized WDL target. Continue with internal dovetail tools only; next try robustness/cross-fold reporting or larger labels rather than more WDL regularization.

task: Test source-aware WDL training target under fixed consensus-label distillation benchmark.
outcome: Discarded. distill_student_score=12.841531 vs current best 12.922135. dev_policy_ce unchanged at 5.993176, but dev_wdl_ce worsened to 0.794058 from 0.745483.

task: Test Polyak/SWA-style averaged weights on fixed consensus teacher-distillation benchmark.
outcome: Kept. distill_student_score improved from 12.922135 to 13.309426. dev_policy_ce improved from 5.993176 to 5.757296; dev_wdl_ce slightly worsened from 0.745483 to 0.756176. Training losses increased, which supports reduced overfit rather than benchmark cheating.
next_action_hint: Commit kept candidate. Then confirm deterministic rerun of averaged-weight baseline before trying further regularization or cross-fold robustness reporting.

task: Deterministic confirmation rerun of averaged-weight distillation baseline.
outcome: Kept. Reproduced distill_student_score=13.309426 exactly with dev_policy_ce=5.757296 and dev_wdl_ce=0.756176; checks passed. Confirms current best N0028 behavior is deterministic under fixed benchmark.
next_action_hint: Continue with robustness/cross-fold reporting or larger teacher-label coverage. Avoid more WDL target/source specialization under current consensus benchmark.

task: Scheduler-assigned baseline trajectory quantum under fixed Phase C distillation segment.
outcome: Kept. L000 reproduced current best distill_student_score=13.309426 with checks passing, aligning baseline trajectory with the averaged-weight L006 result. No code changes.
next_action_hint: Continue automated flow; prefer scheduler-spawned real research lanes over more L000 duplicate confirmations.

task: Add cross-fold robustness reporting without changing primary fixed benchmark.
outcome: Kept. Primary distill_student_score remained 13.309426 exactly. New diagnostics: fold_score_mean=12.742533 and fold_score_std=0.566893, revealing holdout sensitivity on the tiny 10-position consensus set.
next_action_hint: Commit kept diagnostics. Continue with scheduler; prefer improvements that also raise fold_score_mean or create a larger-label segment rather than optimizing only the primary split.

task: Confirm deterministic fold robustness reporting after L000 diagnostic change.
outcome: Kept. Reproduced distill_student_score=13.309426, fold_score_mean=12.742533, and fold_score_std=0.566893 exactly with checks passing. No code changes.

task: Test policy-only weight averaging while keeping final WDL weights.
outcome: Kept. distill_student_score improved from 13.309426 to 13.328393. dev_policy_ce stayed improved at 5.757296 and dev_wdl_ce improved back to 0.745483. Fold mean/std also slightly improved to 12.764220/0.564173.

task: Compare 16x2/24x3/48x5/64x6 frozen conv student architectures for strength-per-byte under the fixed teacher distillation benchmark.
outcome: Kept diagnostics. Primary distill_student_score remained current best 13.328393. Conv diagnostics: 16x2 score=12.851930 score_per_kb=0.504152; 24x3=13.308346/0.204572; 48x5=13.322949/0.035743; 64x6=13.436814/0.017120. 16x2 is best by efficiency; 64x6 is best by raw score.
next_action_hint: Commit diagnostics. If scheduler stays on architecture lane, consider switching primary artifact to raw-best 64x6 conv student in a comparable run; otherwise confirm determinism or rotate to another structural lane.

task: Test separated policy/WDL head training streams under the fixed distillation benchmark.
outcome: Discarded. Primary distill_student_score fell slightly from 13.328393 to 13.328319. WDL and fold robustness improved marginally, but policy CE worsened enough to lose on the fixed primary metric. Code changes were reverted; only dovetail state remains.
next_action_hint: Commit discarded-run dovetail logs. Prefer policy-preserving structural value improvements or raw-best conv primary candidate rather than decoupled training streams.

task: Add policy-only/WDL-only loss-balance diagnostics under fixed benchmark.
outcome: Kept. Primary distill_student_score reproduced at 13.328393. New diagnostics: dev_policy_only_score=14.798818, dev_wdl_only_score=57.290722, dev_loss_balance_gap=5.011813, showing policy CE dominates the combined objective.
next_action_hint: Commit diagnostics. Future L010 work should preserve policy CE; WDL-only improvements are unlikely to matter if they worsen policy.

task: Confirm deterministic reproduction of L010 loss-balance diagnostics.
outcome: Kept. Reproduced distill_student_score=13.328393 and loss-balance diagnostics exactly: dev_policy_only_score=14.798818, dev_wdl_only_score=57.290722, dev_loss_balance_gap=5.011813. Conv diagnostics also reproduced, including conv_64x6_score=13.436814.
